permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., reference files, resource examples, scripts) within the workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to create or modify files (e.g., scaffolded FHIR project files, source code) within the workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to read version-controlled source code files to assist with FHIR API development. Allow?
This skill needs to create or modify source code files (e.g., FastAPI/Express FHIR endpoints, Pydantic models). Allow?
This skill needs to execute a shell script (e.g., 'python scripts/setup_fhir_project.py my_fhir_api') to scaffold a new FHIR API project. Allow?
This skill needs to load external reference content (e.g., references/resource-examples.md, references/smart-auth.md, references/pagination.md, references/bundles.md) into context. Allow?
This skill needs to dispatch to the built-in skill loader to activate the fhir-developer-skill. Allow?
